SR_CORE_SFTY_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 
LABEL: 
Screened Core HRSN Safety Overall Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) safety composite indicator. 
LONG NAME: SR_CORE_SFTY_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
0 = Did not screen positive for safety need 
1 = Screened positive for safety need
